# Vertex AI API Reference

## API Structure
Reference index/navigation page for Vertex AI APIs. Contains no dated changelog entries.

## Key API Resources
- REST API endpoints (v1 and v1beta1 versions)
- SDK references (Python, Go, Node.js, Java, C#)
- gcloud CLI references
- Resource categories: datasets, models, endpoints, training pipelines, feature stores
- Model deployment and prediction services
- Feature management (feature stores, online stores, feature groups)
- Training and tuning jobs
- Metadata stores and artifact management
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) operations
- Reasoning engines

## Additional Resources (refreshed 2026-04-01)
- Batch Prediction Jobs
- Cached Contents
- Custom Jobs
- Datasets & Data Items
- Deployment Resource Pools
- Endpoints (predict, explain, deploy models)
- Feature Groups & Feature Online Stores
- Hyperparameter Tuning Jobs
- Index Endpoints & Indexes
- Metadata Stores
- Model Deployment Monitoring
- Models & Model Evaluations
- Notebook Execution & Runtime Management
- Pipeline Jobs
- RAG Corpora & RAG Files
- Reasoning Engines
- Schedules
- Studies & Trials
- Tensorboards
- Training Pipelines
- Tuning Jobs
- serverStreamingPredict and streamRawPredict operations
- directPredict, directRawPredict methods
- Long-running operations management
- IAM policy controls (getIamPolicy, setIamPolicy, testIamPermissions)
- Synthetic data generation
- Context retrieval and augmentation
- Token counting for language models

## Last Fetched
2026-04-01
